AD_VAL_RULE.NAME: Ssuec_RefValidation
AD_VAL_RULE.CODE: AD_Ref_List.value in (select value from ad_ref_list where ad_reference_id in ( select max(ad_reference_value_id) from ad_column where ad_process_id = (select ad_process_id from ssuec_userconfigext where ssuec_userconfigext_id = @Ssuec_Userconfigext_ID@ ) AND ad_reference_value_id is not null )) AND AD_Ref_List.ad_reference_id in ( select max(ad_reference_value_id) from ad_column where ad_process_id = (select ad_process_id from ssuec_userconfigext where ssuec_userconfigext_id = @Ssuec_Userconfigext_ID@ ) AND ad_reference_value_id is not null )
